Class Car

java.lang.Object
car.Car
public class Car extends Object
Car.java Code Description: Represents a car object in the game. The car has a position, velocity vector, orientation angle, and can optionally display a sprite image.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Car(double xPos, double yPos, String imgFileName)
    Constructs a Car object at the specified position.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    accelerate(double force)
    Accelerates the car in the direction it is currently facing.

    Draws the car onto the screen using the provided Graphics object.

    Returns the car's current orientation angle.

    Returns checkpoint cooldown state.

    Returns number of checkpoints crossed.

    Returns current elapsed race time.

    Returns the current lap count.

    Returns current position of car.
    double

    Returns total race time.

    hitWall()
    Handles collision with a wall using automatic normal detection.

    Reflects the car velocity using the provided wall normal.
    void
    incrementCheckpointCount()
    Increments checkpoint counter.
    void
    incrementLap()
    Increments the lap counter by one.
    void
    loadImage()
    Loads the car sprite image from the /data resource directory.

    move()
    Updates the car's position based on its velocity.
    void

    Resets the car to a clean state for a new race.
    void

    Resets checkpoint counter.
    void
    setAccelerationMultiplier(double amount)
    Sets acceleration multiplier.
    void
    setCheckpointCooldown(boolean a)
    Sets checkpoint cooldown.
    void
    setDrift(boolean isDrift)
    Sets whether the car is drifting.
    void
    setGrip(double amount)
    Sets the grip value of the car.
    void
    setMaxSpeed(double amount)
    Sets maximum speed of the car.
    void
    startTimer()
    Starts race timer.
    void
    stopTimer()
    Stops race timer and records race time.
    void
    turn(double amount)
    Rotates the car by the specified angle.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Car

      public Car(double xPos, double yPos, String imgFileName)
      Constructs a Car object at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      xPos - starting x-coordinate
      yPos - starting y-coordinate
      imgFileName - name of the image file used for the car sprite

  • Method Details

    • accelerate

      public void accelerate(double force)
      Accelerates the car in the direction it is currently facing.
      Parameters:
      force - amount of acceleration applied to the velocity vector

    • turn

      public void turn(double amount)
      Rotates the car by the specified angle.
      Parameters:
      amount - change in angle (radians)

    • move

      public void move()
      Updates the car's position based on its velocity. Also applies friction and limits the maximum speed.

    • loadImage

      public void loadImage()
      Loads the car sprite image from the /data resource directory.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the image file cannot be found

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the car onto the screen using the provided Graphics object. The car is rotated according to its current angle.
      Parameters:
      g - graphics context used for rendering

    • getAngle

      public double getAngle()
      Returns the car's current orientation angle.
      Returns:
      angle in radians

    • setDrift

      public void setDrift(boolean isDrift)
      Sets whether the car is drifting.
      Parameters:
      isDrift - true if the car should be drifting

    • getLap

      public int getLap()
      Returns the current lap count.
      Returns:
      lap number

    • incrementLap

      public void incrementLap()
      Increments the lap counter by one.

    • getCheckPointCount

      public int getCheckPointCount()
      Returns number of checkpoints crossed.
      Returns:
      checkpoint count

    • incrementCheckpointCount

      public void incrementCheckpointCount()
      Increments checkpoint counter.

    • resetCheckpointCount

      public void resetCheckpointCount()
      Resets checkpoint counter.

    • getPos

      public int[] getPos()
      Returns current position of car.
      Returns:
      array containing x and y position

    • setGrip

      public void setGrip(double amount)
      Sets the grip value of the car.
      Parameters:
      amount - grip value

    • setAccelerationMultiplier

      public void setAccelerationMultiplier(double amount)
      Sets acceleration multiplier.
      Parameters:
      amount - acceleration multiplier

    • setMaxSpeed

      public void setMaxSpeed(double amount)
      Sets maximum speed of the car.
      Parameters:
      amount - max speed

    • getCheckpointCooldown

      public boolean getCheckpointCooldown()
      Returns checkpoint cooldown state.
      Returns:
      true if cooldown active

    • setCheckpointCooldown

      public void setCheckpointCooldown(boolean a)
      Sets checkpoint cooldown.
      Parameters:
      a - cooldown state

    • startTimer

      public void startTimer()
      Starts race timer.

    • stopTimer

      public void stopTimer()
      Stops race timer and records race time.

    • getCurrentTime

      public double getCurrentTime()
      Returns current elapsed race time.
      Returns:
      time in seconds

    • getRaceTime

      public double getRaceTime()
      Returns total race time.
      Returns:
      race time in seconds

    • hitWall

      public void hitWall()
      Handles collision with a wall using automatic normal detection.

    • hitWall

      public void hitWall(double normalX, double normalY)
      Reflects the car velocity using the provided wall normal.
      Parameters:
      normalX - x component of wall normal
      normalY - y component of wall normal

    • reset

      public void reset(double xPos, double yPos)
      Resets the car to a clean state for a new race. Zeroes velocity, angle, lap count, checkpoint count, and all physics state so no data bleeds in from a previous game.
      Parameters:
      xPos - new starting x position
      yPos - new starting y position
